function changePositions(pos) {
var url = "/international/stats/2026/Averages/Qualified/All/points/PG/desc/1";
if (url.indexOf(pos) >= 0) {
url = url.replace("?"+pos+"=&","?");
url = url.replace("&"+pos+"=&","&");
url = url.replace("?"+pos+"=","");
url = url.replace("&"+pos+"=","");
url = url.replace("&"+pos,"");
} else {
if (url.indexOf("?") >= 0) {
url = url+"&"+pos+"=";
} else {
url = url+"?"+pos+"=";
}
}
open_network(url);
}
</script>


                  <div style="clear: both;"></div>

   <script type="text/javascript">
      async function loadRealGMNewsFeed() {
          const FEED_URL = 'https://basketball.realgm.com/rss/realgm_all_sports.xml';
          const container = document.getElementById('realgm-feed-content');
          try {
              const response = await fetch(FEED_URL);
              const text = await response.text();
              const xml = new DOMParser().parseFromString(text, "text/xml");
              const items = xml.querySelectorAll("item");
              let html = '';
              items.forEach((item, index) => {
                  if (index < 5) {
                      const title = item.querySelector("title").textContent;
                      const link = item.querySelector("link").textContent;
                      const imgUrl = item.querySelector("image").textContent ?? 'https://basketball.realgm.com/images/icons/realgm-black-80-alt.png';
                      html += `<div class="realgm-item"><a href="${link}"><img src="${imgUrl}" class="realgm-thumb"></a><div class="realgm-text"><a href="${link}">${title}</a></div></div>`;
                  }
              });
              container.innerHTML = html;
              if (html != "") {
                 document.getElementById('realgm-feed-header').innerHTML = '<p><strong>More from RealGM:</strong></p>';
              }
          } catch (e) {
            container.innerHTML = '';
          }
      }
      loadRealGMNewsFeed();
   </script>
